title: Curated Dungeons Weapons
description: A mod adding weapons from minecraft dungeons, but only the good ones!
body:
> ***This mod is archived as I am working on a weapons mod the likes of which the world has never seen the likes of which.***

# Curated Dungeons Weapons
This mod adds some of the weapons from Minecraft Dungeons to your game, **but only the good ones!**

This mod is compatible with [Better Combat](modrinth.com/mod/better-combat), but it will work just fine without it.

## Weapons List
So far, the mod adds the following weapons:

- Dagger
- Spear
- Hammer
- Mace
- Staff
- Katana
- Claymore
- Glaive
- Tempest Knife

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks and also feel free to [buy me a coffee](buymeacoffee.com/dwnsdp) if you like it. 

I hope you enjoy this mod and have fun with the new weapons.
